publicationStmt.p: Transcribed from Bodleian Library, Lovelace Byron collection, Box 166, folios 180-181. Transcription by Lisa Gold (2022). TEI conversion for Sextant pipeline, 2026.

div.p: I think there is no doubt now of a decisive improvement. I wrote you two letters yesterdy to Waverly, which I hope you have recd.-- The second was but a very hurried P.S, containing Dr Locock's opinion.
manner is that he finds more local improvement than he expected. He almost clapped his hands, & he was so pleased that he ran into the next room quite eagerly, to tell Mrs Greig.--
At the same time, I shall feel no confidence at present;-- especially
until the next Period is over. I dread that epoch particularly.
I have been walking round the Crescent, for about 8 minutes today.
I am very much stronger, & I have had no pain (since 4 o'clock this morg), which is a very long interval. I have
no doubt the leeches were the right thing. They are to be repeated next week I believe.
Wilkinson is in Town, & Crosse has returned.
Altogether I think we may begin to hold our heads up again a little about my prospects, & I am in very good spirits, & quite pleased.
